title: Verify confirm refunds and reversals contract
preconditions: A fresh representative local Ledger and the valid and invalid inputs required by FR-LEDGER-REFUND-CONFIRMATION are available.
steps: Invoke the relevant operations through the public CLI contract and exercise every acceptance criterion of FR-LEDGER-REFUND-CONFIRMATION.
expected: All FR-LEDGER-REFUND-CONFIRMATION acceptance criteria hold, including exact full-amount and currency eligibility, rejected partial and over-refund attempts, unmatched and active-role duplicate behavior, immutable source facts, lifecycle/history visibility, idempotent replay, stable errors, and no mutation on failure.
